source:
'use client' import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react' import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion' import { ShoppingBag, Search, Filter, Eye, Truck, CheckCircle, XCircle, Clock, DollarSign, Calendar, MapPin, CreditCard, User, Package, ChevronDown, X } from 'lucide-react' const OrderManagement = () => { const [orders, setOrders] = useState([]) const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true) const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('') const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('') const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1) const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1) const [stats, setStats] = useState({}) const [selectedOrder, setSelectedOrder] = useState(null) const [showModal, setShowModal] = useState(false) const fetchOrders = useCallback(async () => { try { setLoading(true) const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: currentPage.toString(), limit: '10', search: searchTerm, status: statusFilter }) const response = await fetch(`/api/orders?${params}`) const data = await response.json() if (data.success) { setOrders(data.data || []) setTotalPages(data.pagination?.pages || 1) } } catch (error) { console.error('Error fetching orders:', error) } finally { setLoading(false) } }, [currentPage, searchTerm, statusFilter]) useEffect(() => { fetchOrders() }, [fetchOrders]) useEffect(() => { const calculateStats = () => { const totalOrders = orders.length const pendingOrders = orders.filter(o => o.status === 'PENDING').length const processingOrders = orders.filter(o => o.status === 'PROCESSING').length const shippedOrders = orders.filter(o => o.status === 'SHIPPED').length const deliveredOrders = orders.filter(o => o.status === 'DELIVERED').length const cancelledOrders = orders.filter(o => o.status === 'CANCELLED').length setStats({ totalOrders, pendingOrders, processingOrders, shippedOrders, deliveredOrders, cancelledOrders }) } if (orders.length > 0) { calculateStats() } }, [orders]) const handleViewDetails = (order) => { setSelectedOrder(order) setShowModal(true) } const handleUpdateStatus = async (orderId, newStatus) => { try { const response = await fetch('/api/orders', { method: 'PUT', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ orderId, status: newStatus }) }) const data = await response.json() if (data.success) { fetchOrders() } else { alert('Failed to update order status') } } catch (error) { console.error('Error updating order:', error) alert('Failed to update order status') } } const getStatusIcon = (status) => { switch (status) { case 'PENDING': return case 'PROCESSING': return case 'SHIPPED': return case 'DELIVERED': return case 'CANCELLED': return default: return } } const getStatusColor = (status) => { switch (status) { case 'PENDING': return 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800' case 'PROCESSING': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800' case 'SHIPPED': return 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800' case 'DELIVERED': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' case 'CANCELLED': return 'bg-red-100 text-red-800' default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800' } } const formatPrice = (price) => { return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US', { style: 'currency', currency: 'USD' }).format(price) } return (
{/* Header */}

Order Management

Manage and track all customer orders

 {/* Stats Cards */}

Total Orders

{stats.totalOrders || 0}

Pending

{stats.pendingOrders || 0}

Processing

{stats.processingOrders || 0}

Shipped

{stats.shippedOrders || 0}

Delivered

{stats.deliveredOrders || 0}

Cancelled

{stats.cancelledOrders || 0}

 {/* Filters */}
setSearchTerm(e.target.value)} className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent" />

Total Orders: {stats.totalOrders || 0}

 {/* Orders Table */} {loading ? (

Loading orders...

) : ( <>
{orders.map((order, index) => ( ))}
Order ID Customer Items Total Status Date Actions
#{order.id.substring(0, 8)}
{order.user?.username || 'N/A'}
{order.user?.email}
{order.orderItems?.length || 0} item(s)
{formatPrice(parseFloat(order.totalAmount) || 0)}
{getStatusIcon(order.status)} {order.status}
{new Date(order.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}
{order.status === 'PENDING' && ( )} {order.status === 'PROCESSING' && ( )} {order.status === 'SHIPPED' && ( )}
{/* Pagination */} {totalPages > 1 && (
Showing page {currentPage} of {totalPages}
)} )} {/* Order Details Modal */} {showModal && selectedOrder && (

Order Details

{/* Order Info */}

Order ID

#{selectedOrder.id.substring(0, 8)}

Status

{getStatusIcon(selectedOrder.status)} {selectedOrder.status}

Date

{new Date(selectedOrder.createdAt).toLocaleString()}

Payment Method

{selectedOrder.paymentMethod || 'N/A'}

{/* Customer Info */}

Customer Information

Name

{selectedOrder.user?.username || 'N/A'}

Email

{selectedOrder.user?.email || 'N/A'}

{selectedOrder.shippingAddress && (

Shipping Address

{selectedOrder.shippingAddress}

)}
{/* Order Items */}

Order Items

{selectedOrder.orderItems?.map((item, index) => (
{item.product?.proImages && ( )}
{item.product?.proName || 'Unknown Product'}

Quantity: {item.quantity}

{formatPrice(parseFloat(item.price) || 0)}

Total: {formatPrice((parseFloat(item.price) || 0) * item.quantity)}

))}
{/* Total */}
Total Amount {formatPrice(parseFloat(selectedOrder.totalAmount) || 0)}
)}
) } export default OrderManagement

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchProducts'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [currentPage, searchTerm, categoryFilter, vendorFilter, statusFilter, approvalFilter, sortBy, fetchProducts]

fix.text: [currentPage, searchTerm, categoryFilter, vendorFilter, statusFilter, approvalFilter, sortBy, fetchProducts]
